embeds.title: Staff Role Guides
embeds.description:
Welcome to the **Staff Information Center**. This channel contains individual role guides for every staff position in The SnowHaven Empire.

Each guide covers responsibilities, authority, escalation procedures, and how-to references. Read your guide fully before performing moderation actions.

fields.name: 👑 Foundership
fields.value:
👑 **Foundership Team** — Founding members, absolute final authority
🧑‍🤝‍🧑 **Co-Founder** — Co-founding members, permanent senior authority

fields.name: ⚡ Leadership
fields.value:
⚡ **Owner** — Server owner, absolute day-to-day authority
👑 **Co-Owner** — Top-level authority, acts when Owner is offline
⚔️ **Head Executive** — Senior executive, major decisions
🏛️ **Executive** — Core leadership, oversees all departments

fields.name: 🛡️ Administration
fields.value:
🪩 **Head Administrator** — Leads and manages the mod team
🔥 **Administrator** — Full admin, broad moderation authority

fields.name: 🌀 Moderation
fields.value:
🌙 **Head Moderator** — Leads Mods, handles escalated cases
🌀 **Moderator** — Frontline rule enforcement

fields.name: 🔑 Admin Panel
fields.value: Leadership and above have access to the **TSHE website admin panel** at https://tshe.noxxbot.com/admin — use the button below. Credentials are provided by your direct superior. **Do not share your login.**

fields.name: 📋 General Reminders
fields.value:
• Always follow the escalation chain — don't skip levels
• When in doubt, ask a superior before acting
• Document every moderation action in #mod-log
• Keep staff discussions confidential
• Treat members and colleagues with professionalism at all times

footer.text: The SnowHaven Empire — Staff Only • tshe.noxxbot.com
